items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Claude Code 推出全新渲染器，可通过 CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1 启用。Thariq 邀请用户试用并分享体验反馈，同时发布了完整文档链接。
items.content_en: Claude Code launches a new renderer, enabled via CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1. Thariq invites users to try it and share their experience, along with full documentation links.

items.author: Swyx
items.bio: AI Engineer founder, Latent Space podcast
items.content_zh: Swyx 指出全球约 80% 的 AI agent 和 AI 工程工作集中在旧金山的 3 平方英里范围内，凸显了 AI 开发的极度地理集中性。
items.content_en: Swyx points out that roughly 80% of the world's AI agents and AI engineering work happens within 3 square miles in San Francisco, highlighting the extreme geographic concentration of AI development.

items.author: Swyx
items.bio: AI Engineer founder, Latent Space podcast
items.content_zh: Swyx 透露 Cognition 的使用量在两次发布后全球翻倍，用户发现了各种组合 agent 和让 agent 主动工作的创意用法。他提出「agent 递归就是你所需要的一切」这一观点，暗示 agent 之间的组合与递归调用可能是下一个重要范式。
items.content_en: Swyx reveals Cognition's usage has roughly doubled globally since two recent launches, with users discovering creative use cases for composing agents together and making them proactive. He suggests 'agent recursion is all you need' — hinting that composition and recursive agent invocation may be the next important paradigm.

items.author: Ryo Lu
items.content_zh: Cursor 即将推出更多自定义和多 agent 视图功能，支持上下左右分屏布局，让开发者可以同时查看多个 agent 的工作状态。
items.content_en: Cursor is rolling out more customization and multi-agent views — split panes up, down, left, right — letting developers monitor multiple agents working simultaneously.

items.author: PM.Akro
items.content_zh: Open Source 开发社区讨论不同 agent 框架的设计架构，对比了 API 设计与扩展性，强调了模块化在构建灵活 agent 系统中的重要性。
items.content_en: The Open Source developer community discusses design architectures of different agent frameworks, comparing API design and extensibility, emphasizing modularity's importance in building flexible agent systems.

items.author: Yohei Nakajima
items.content_zh: Yohei 分享了关于如何设计高效 agent 的最佳实践，包括清晰的目标设定、有效的反馈机制和迭代优化方法。
items.content_en: Yohei shares best practices for designing efficient agents, including clear goal setting, effective feedback mechanisms, and iterative optimization approaches.

items.author: Yann LeCun
items.content_zh: Yann LeCun 指出深度学习在 agent 设计中的核心作用，强调了端到端学习和自监督学习对构建自主系统的重要性。
items.content_en: Yann LeCun points out the central role of deep learning in agent design, emphasizing end-to-end learning and self-supervised learning's importance for building autonomous systems.

items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.content_zh: Andrej 发表了关于 AI safety 在 agent 系统中的考量，强调了可解释性、监管和对齐问题的重要性。
items.content_en: Andrej publishes thoughts on AI safety considerations in agent systems, emphasizing the importance of interpretability, oversight, and alignment issues.

items.author: Ethan Mollick
items.content_zh: Ethan 分享了 AI 在教育中的应用案例，特别是如何利用 agent 技术构建个性化学习系统，提高学生的学习效率。
items.content_en: Ethan shares case studies on AI applications in education, particularly how agent technology can build personalized learning systems to improve student learning efficiency.

items.author: David Ha
items.content_zh: David 探讨了神经网络与传统编程结合的可能性，提出了混合型 agent 架构的新思路。
items.content_en: David explores the possibility of combining neural networks with traditional programming, proposing new ideas for hybrid agent architectures.

items.author: Santiago
items.content_zh: Santiago 发布了一个关于如何使用最新 agent 框架快速构建原型的教程，包括详细的代码示例和最佳实践。
items.content_en: Santiago releases a tutorial on how to quickly prototype using the latest agent frameworks, including detailed code examples and best practices.

items.author: Jackson Fall
items.content_zh: Jackson 分享了在生产环境中部署 agent 系统的经验教训，包括性能优化、监控和故障排除的技巧。
items.content_en: Jackson shares lessons learned from deploying agent systems in production, including performance optimization, monitoring, and troubleshooting tips.

items.author: James Mather
items.content_zh: James 发表了一篇深度分析文章，讨论了当前 agent 技术的局限性和未来发展方向。
items.content_en: James publishes an in-depth analysis discussing the limitations of current agent technology and future development directions.

items.author: Abraham Newman
items.content_zh: Abraham 宣布 OpenRouter 新增对多个开源 agent 框架的支持，使开发者可以更灵活地选择模型和服务。
items.content_en: Abraham announces OpenRouter's new support for multiple open-source agent frameworks, allowing developers more flexibility in model and service selection.

items.author: Kevin Xu
items.content_zh: Kevin 展示了在 GPU 加速下的 agent 性能优化成果，实现了显著的推理速度提升。
items.content_en: Kevin demonstrates agent performance optimization results under GPU acceleration, achieving significant inference speed improvements.

items.author: Charlie Chen
items.content_zh: Charlie 发布了 DeepSeek 最新的 agent 模型，相比前代版本在推理能力和上下文处理上有显著提升。
items.content_en: Charlie releases DeepSeek's latest agent model with significant improvements in reasoning capabilities and context processing compared to previous versions.

items.author: Sam Altman
items.content_zh: Sam 分享了 OpenAI 对 agent 技术发展方向的思考，强调了安全性和可控性在 agent 系统中的核心地位。
items.content_en: Sam shares OpenAI's thoughts on the development direction of agent technology, emphasizing safety and controllability as core aspects of agent systems.

items.author: Chris Albon
items.content_zh: Chris 发表了关于如何评估 agent 系统性能的指标和方法论，帮助开发者更好地理解和优化系统。
items.content_en: Chris publishes metrics and methodology for evaluating agent system performance, helping developers better understand and optimize systems.

items.author: David Ha
items.content_zh: David 分享了一个有趣的观点：agent 不仅需要强大的语言模型支撑，还需要强大的记忆管理系统来实现真正的自主性。
items.content_en: David shares an interesting perspective: agents need not only powerful language models but also robust memory management systems to achieve true autonomy.

items.author: Jackson Fall
items.content_zh: Jackson 分享了使用 vector database 优化 agent 知识检索的技巧，显著提高了 agent 的决策速度和准确性。
items.content_en: Jackson shares techniques for optimizing agent knowledge retrieval using vector databases, significantly improving decision speed and accuracy.

items.author: Santiago
items.content_zh: Santiago 发布了一个关于如何实现 multi-agent 系统的完整指南，包括通信机制、协作策略和冲突解决方法。
items.content_en: Santiago releases a comprehensive guide on implementing multi-agent systems, including communication mechanisms, collaboration strategies, and conflict resolution methods.

items.author: Yann LeCun
items.content_zh: Yann 强调了世界模型对构建更智能 agent 的重要性，呼吁研究人员关注这一关键领域。
items.content_en: Yann emphasizes the importance of world models for building more intelligent agents, calling researchers' attention to this critical area.

items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.content_zh: Andrej 发表了关于从 scaling law 学习设计 agent 的观点，提出了几个有趣的思路来提升 agent 能力。
items.content_en: Andrej publishes thoughts on designing agents based on scaling laws, proposing several interesting ideas to enhance agent capabilities.

items.author: Ethan Mollick
items.content_zh: Ethan 分享了通过 AI agent 进行教学创新的最新案例，包括如何设计更有效的教学 agent 和学生反馈机制。
items.content_en: Ethan shares the latest cases of teaching innovation through AI agents, including how to design more effective teaching agents and student feedback mechanisms.

items.author: James Mather
items.content_zh: James 撰写了一篇关于 agent 道德问题的深度文章，讨论了在使用 AI agent 时需要考虑的伦理问题。
items.content_en: James writes an in-depth article on the ethical issues of agents, discussing ethical considerations when using AI agents.

items.author: Abraham Newman
items.content_zh: Abraham 分享了 OpenRouter 最新的性能数据，展示了不同 agent 框架在实际应用中的效率差异。
items.content_en: Abraham shares OpenRouter's latest performance data, showing efficiency differences between different agent frameworks in real applications.

items.author: Kevin Xu
items.content_zh: Kevin 发布了最新的 CUDA 优化代码，用于加速 transformer 模型在 agent 推理中的性能。
items.content_en: Kevin releases the latest CUDA optimized code for accelerating transformer model performance in agent inference.

items.author: Charlie Chen
items.content_zh: Charlie 宣布 DeepSeek 推出了一个新的 agent 评估基准，可以更全面地测试 agent 在各种任务上的能力。
items.content_en: Charlie announces DeepSeek launches a new agent evaluation benchmark that can more comprehensively test agent capabilities across various tasks.

items.author: Sam Altman
items.content_zh: Sam 发布了 OpenAI 最新的 agent 研究论文预印本，提出了新的方法来改进 agent 的对齐和可控性。
items.content_en: Sam releases the latest OpenAI agent research paper preprint, proposing new methods to improve agent alignment and controllability.

items.author: Chris Albon
items.content_zh: Chris 分享了一个有趣的发现：多模态 agent（能处理文本、图像、音频）在某些任务上比单模态 agent 性能更优。
items.content_en: Chris shares an interesting finding: multimodal agents (capable of handling text, images, audio) outperform unimodal agents on certain tasks.

items.author: David Ha
items.content_zh: David 发布了关于如何使用强化学习改进 agent 行为的研究，展示了 RL feedback 对 agent 学习的重要性。
items.content_en: David releases research on how to use reinforcement learning to improve agent behavior, demonstrating RL feedback's importance for agent learning.

items.author: Jackson Fall
items.content_zh: Jackson 分享了在实际项目中如何处理 agent 的错误恢复和异常处理，提供了很多实用的建议。
items.content_en: Jackson shares how to handle agent error recovery and exception handling in real projects, providing many practical suggestions.

items.author: Santiago
items.content_zh: Santiago 发布了一个新的视频教程系列，深入讲解了如何从零开始构建一个生产级别的 agent 系统。
items.content_en: Santiago releases a new video tutorial series that in-depth explains how to build a production-grade agent system from scratch.

items.author: Yann LeCun
items.content_zh: Yann 发表了关于 agent 的可解释性问题的评论，强调了在部署 agent 系统时理解其决策过程的重要性。
items.content_en: Yann comments on agent interpretability issues, emphasizing the importance of understanding decision-making processes when deploying agent systems.

items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.content_zh: Andrej 分享了自动驾驶 agent 的最新进展，特别是在复杂场景理解和决策上的突破。
items.content_en: Andrej shares the latest progress of autonomous driving agents, especially breakthroughs in complex scene understanding and decision-making.

items.author: Ethan Mollick
items.content_zh: Ethan 分享了使用 agent 进行学术研究的新方法，包括如何利用 agent 加速文献综述和数据分析。
items.content_en: Ethan shares new methods for academic research using agents, including how to use agents to accelerate literature reviews and data analysis.

items.author: James Mather
items.content_zh: James 发表了一篇技术分析，对比了不同 agent 框架在隐私保护方面的表现和差异。
items.content_en: James publishes a technical analysis comparing different agent frameworks' performance and differences in privacy protection.

items.author: Abraham Newman
items.content_zh: Abraham 宣布 OpenRouter 推出了新的定价模式，使小团队和初创公司能够更便宜地使用高性能 agent 模型。
items.content_en: Abraham announces OpenRouter's new pricing model, enabling small teams and startups to use high-performance agent models more affordably.

items.author: Kevin Xu
items.content_zh: Kevin 发布了最新的基准测试数据，显示了在不同硬件配置下 agent 系统的性能表现。
items.content_en: Kevin releases the latest benchmark data showing agent system performance across different hardware configurations.

items.author: Charlie Chen
items.content_zh: Charlie 分享了 DeepSeek 在 agent 数据合成方面的创新方法，这对改进 agent 的训练数据质量很有帮助。
items.content_en: Charlie shares DeepSeek's innovative methods in agent data synthesis, which is helpful for improving agent training data quality.

items.author: Sam Altman
items.content_zh: Sam 发布了 OpenAI 的 2026 年 agent 研发路线图，包括多个令人期待的新功能和改进。
items.content_en: Sam releases OpenAI's 2026 agent R&D roadmap, including multiple anticipated new features and improvements.

items.author: Chris Albon
items.content_zh: Chris 分享了一个新的框架用于评估 agent 系统的健壮性和可靠性，这对构建生产级别的系统很有帮助。
items.content_en: Chris shares a new framework for evaluating agent system robustness and reliability, which is helpful for building production-grade systems.

items.author: David Ha
items.content_zh: David 发表了关于 agent 的想象力和创意能力的研究，提出了如何通过新的方法让 agent 更具创意。
items.content_en: David publishes research on agent imagination and creative capabilities, proposing new methods to make agents more creative.

items.author: Jackson Fall
items.content_zh: Jackson 分享了在 Kubernetes 上部署 agent 服务的最佳实践，包括容器化、编排和监控的技巧。
items.content_en: Jackson shares best practices for deploying agent services on Kubernetes, including containerization, orchestration, and monitoring tips.

items.author: Santiago
items.content_zh: Santiago 发布了一个完整的 agent 开发工具链指南，涵盖了从开发、测试到部署的全个流程。
items.content_en: Santiago releases a complete guide to agent development toolchain, covering the entire process from development, testing to deployment.

items.author: Yann LeCun
items.content_zh: Yann 讨论了如何构建更有效的 agent 反馈循环，强调了持续学习和改进的重要性。
items.content_en: Yann discusses how to build more effective agent feedback loops, emphasizing the importance of continuous learning and improvement.

items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.content_zh: Andrej 发表了关于 agent 在自动驾驶领域的应用限制和挑战的分析，提出了几个可能的解决方向。
items.content_en: Andrej publishes an analysis of application limitations and challenges of agents in autonomous driving, proposing several possible solutions.

items.author: Ethan Mollick
items.content_zh: Ethan 分享了他在教学中应用 agent 的经验和教训，包括学生们如何更好地与 agent 协作。
items.content_en: Ethan shares his experience and lessons from applying agents in teaching, including how students can better collaborate with agents.

items.author: James Mather
items.content_zh: James 发布了一篇综合分析，对比了不同大模型作为 agent backbone 的优缺点。
items.content_en: James publishes a comprehensive analysis comparing the pros and cons of different large models as agent backbones.

items.author: Abraham Newman
items.content_zh: Abraham 分享了 OpenRouter 上最受欢迎的 agent 模型排行榜和用户使用统计。
items.content_en: Abraham shares the leaderboard of most popular agent models on OpenRouter and user usage statistics.

items.author: Kevin Xu
items.content_zh: Kevin 发布了关于 GPU 集群优化的白皮书，涵盖了如何构建高效的 agent 推理基础设施。
items.content_en: Kevin releases a whitepaper on GPU cluster optimization, covering how to build efficient agent inference infrastructure.

items.author: Charlie Chen
items.content_zh: Charlie 宣布 DeepSeek 推出了新的 agent 开发框架，提供了更加简洁和高效的 API 接口。
items.content_en: Charlie announces DeepSeek launches a new agent development framework with a more concise and efficient API interface.

items.author: Sam Altman
items.content_zh: Sam 分享了 OpenAI 对未来 5 年 agent 技术发展的愿景和预测。
items.content_en: Sam shares OpenAI's vision and predictions for the development of agent technology over the next 5 years.

items.author: Chris Albon
items.content_zh: Chris 发表了关于如何在大规模生产环境中管理 agent 系统的经验分享。
items.content_en: Chris publishes experience sharing on how to manage agent systems in large-scale production environments.

items.author: David Ha
items.content_zh: David 发布了一个新的研究方向，探索如何使用神经网络压缩来提高 agent 推理的效率。
items.content_en: David releases a new research direction exploring how to use neural network compression to improve agent inference efficiency.

items.author: Jackson Fall
items.content_zh: Jackson 分享了关于如何构建 agent 的可观测性系统的最佳实践，包括日志、指标和追踪。
items.content_en: Jackson shares best practices for building observability systems for agents, including logging, metrics, and tracing.

items.author: Santiago
items.content_zh: Santiago 发布了一个关于 agent 成本优化的完整指南，帮助开发者降低运营成本。
items.content_en: Santiago releases a complete guide on agent cost optimization, helping developers reduce operational costs.

items.author: Anthropic Engineering
items.content_zh: Anthropic 工程团队分享了关于如何在大规模 LLM 推理中优化能源效率和成本的最新研究，重点关注 agent 系统的可持续性和环保性。
items.content_en: Anthropic Engineering team shares the latest research on optimizing energy efficiency and cost in large-scale LLM inference, focusing on sustainability and environmental impact of agent systems.

items.author: Anthropic Engineering
items.content_zh: Anthropic 研究团队发表了关于 AI safety 在生产 agent 系统中的应用的白皮书，强调了可控性和监管的重要性。
items.content_en: Anthropic Research team publishes a whitepaper on the application of AI safety in production agent systems, emphasizing controllability and oversight.

items.author: Anthropic Engineering
items.content_zh: Anthropic 分享了最新的模型能力评估报告，展示了新版本模型在复杂推理和决策任务中的显著进步。
items.content_en: Anthropic shares the latest model capability assessment report, showing significant progress of new model versions in complex reasoning and decision-making tasks.

items.author: Anthropic Engineering
items.content_zh: Anthropic 工程博客发布了关于构建可靠 agent 系统的最佳实践指南，包括测试策略、部署流程和监控方法。
items.content_en: Anthropic engineering blog publishes a best practices guide for building reliable agent systems, including testing strategies, deployment processes, and monitoring methods.
